generation.title: Voice Generation
generation.pageSubtitle: Generate speech from your scripts and voice samples
generation.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this generation?
generation.bulkDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {count} generations?
generation.deleteError: Failed to delete generation. Please try again.
generation.startError: Failed to start generation. Please try again.
generation.noHistory: No generations yet. Start your first generation!
generation.step1: 1. Select a dialog session from your project
generation.step2: 2. Configure generation parameters (model type, CFG scale, seed)
generation.step4: 4. Monitor progress in the current generation panel
generation.step5: 5. Download completed audio from the history list
generation.float8Info: Optimized 8-bit model, Load faster with less memory and slow inferencing
generation.bf16Info: Full precision model, higher quality but slower loading and faster inferencing
generation.noSessionsAvailable: No dialog sessions available. Create one first in Voice Contents Editor.
generation.float8Description: float8_e4m3fn is optimized for performance with minimal quality loss
generation.attentionFixed: Fixed to SDPA (Scaled Dot Product Attention)
generation.fewerGpuLayersInfo: Fewer GPU layers = More VRAM savings but slower inference
generation.validationSeedsPositive: Seeds must be a positive number
generation.validationCfgScalePositive: CFG Scale must be greater than 0
generation.offloadingInfo: Layer offloading reduces VRAM usage by moving some transformer layers to CPU memory. This allows generation on lower-end GPUs at the cost of reduced speed.
generation.confirmSingleDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this generation? This will also delete the generated audio file.
generation.confirmBulkDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {count} generation{plural}? This will also delete the generated audio files.
generation.noLoraFilesAvailable: No LoRA models available. Train one first in Fine-Tuning.
generation.noLoraFilesHint: No LoRA models available. Complete training in Fine-Tuning to enable this feature.
generation.loraWeightDescription: Controls how much the LoRA model affects generation. Higher values apply stronger style transfer.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.validation: Validation error. Please check your input.

training.pageSubtitle: Train LoRA adapters for custom voice models
training.jobNamePlaceholder: Enter a name for this training job
training.selectDatasetPlaceholder: Choose a dataset from the list
training.selectDatasetDescription: Select a dataset created in Dataset Management
training.noDatasetsAvailable: No datasets available. Please create a dataset first in Dataset Management.
training.createDatasetFirst: Please create a dataset in Dataset Management before starting training.
training.epochsDescription: Number of training epochs (full passes through the dataset)
training.batchSizeDescription: Number of samples per training batch (usually 1 for GPU memory constraints)
training.learningRateDescription: Learning rate for the optimizer (1e-4 is a good default)
training.loraRankDescription: Rank of LoRA adapter (lower = smaller model, less capacity)
training.float8Warning: float8_e4m3fn requires RTX 40XX series (Ada Lovelace) or newer GPUs
training.gradientAccumulationDescription: Number of steps to accumulate gradients (effective batch size = batch_size × this value)
training.saveModelPerEpochDescription: Save checkpoint every N epochs (0 = save only at the end)
training.layerOffloadingDescription: Number of transformer layers to keep on GPU (0 = all on GPU, >0 = some on CPU to save VRAM)
training.validationBatchSizePositive: Batch size must be greater than 0
training.validationLearningRatePositive: Learning rate must be greater than 0
training.startSuccess: Training job started successfully! Job ID: {jobId}
training.noHistory: No training jobs yet. Start your first training!
training.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this training job?
training.pendingMessage: Training job is queued and waiting to start...
training.step1: 1. Prepare your dataset in JSONL format with audio and text pairs
training.step2: 2. Configure training parameters (epochs, learning rate, LoRA rank)
training.step4: 4. Monitor live training metrics including loss and progress
training.step5: 5. Download LoRA adapters when training completes
training.loraInfo: Low-Rank Adaptation - efficient fine-tuning method that trains small adapter layers
training.adamw8bitInfo: 8-bit Adam optimizer - reduces memory usage during training
training.gradientAccumulationInfo: Accumulates gradients over multiple steps to simulate larger batch sizes
training.layerOffloadingInfo: Moves some layers to CPU to reduce GPU memory usage at the cost of speed
training.clickLegendToToggle: 💡 Click legend items to show/hide specific metrics
training.confirmBulkDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {count} training job{plural}? This will also delete all associated LoRA files.
training.bulkDeleteFailed: Failed to delete some training jobs
